# Contributing to PostCode

G'day there! Thanks for your interest in PostCode. Here is a quick note on how this project works.

PostCode is **source-available, but not open-source.** The code is public for transparency and reference, but it's copyrighted and developed solely by its author. See the [LICENCE](../LICENCE.txt) for what that means.

## Pull requests aren't accepted

I'm not taking code contributions, so **please don't open a pull request**. Nothing personal; it keeps the codebase and copyright clean.

If you've spotted something you'd fix, I still want to hear it — open an issue describing the problem (and the fix you have in mind), and I'll take it from there.

## Issues are very welcome

This is the best way to make PostCode better:

- **🐛 Bug reports** — is the app not behaving right?
- **⚡️ Feature requests** — a workflow that could be easier, a feature that I've missed, an idea?
- **❓ Questions** — about how something works.

### Filing a good bug report

The more of this you include, the faster I can fix it:

- What you did, what you expected, and what actually happened.
- The mode (Calculator / Run / Converter) and the frame rate.
- The exact timecode(s) or values involved, if relevant.
- Your device and OS version (e.g. iPhone XR on iOS 18.7.9).
- A screenshot or recording, if you can.

## Security issues

Please **don't** file security vulnerabilities as public issues — see [SECURITY](SECURITY.md) for how to report them privately.

## Be decent

All interaction is covered by the [CODE OF CONDUCT](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
